prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约494名→437名→57名→63名→71名。2021–2022年因包含自然科学试验班等低分段专业，位次在400–500名区间；2023年起招生专 业结构调整，仅保留高分专业组，位次跃升至57–71名区间。2025年基准位次约71名，近3年位次在57–71间窄幅波动，整体稳定在顶尖区间；该校在甘肃省物理 类招生计划：2021年20人、2022年4人、2023年4人、2024年6人、2025年5人；2026年计划大幅扩招至35人，较2025年增加30人，增幅达600%。扩招幅度极为显著，将大 幅缓解录取竞争，推动最低位次明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续位居第4名，属于全国顶尖高校阵营，办学 层次极高；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端（撤稿量较多、学生私吞奖金等）及校园安全事件，共16条事件记录；抖音热度排名第42位， 评价为较热，短视频曝光量中等偏上；2021年曾出现投档线异常信号（河南理科华五倒数第一），但近年未见明显断档记录。整体声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制报考热情，但交大顶尖 地位仍具强吸引力；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科达28个，其中A+学科包括机械工程、材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、生物学、工商管理、管理科学与 工程、临床医学、口腔医学、外国语言文学等；招生专业中人工智能、电子信息类对应计算机科学与技术A+，机械类对应机械工程A+，经济管理试验班对应工商管理A+、管理科学 与工程A+，学科实力极强，对高分考生吸引力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，人工智能专业热度升温， 与交大优势学科高度契合，报考热度不减；甘肃省2026年普通高考考生总数约218700人，较2025年物理类+历史类合计179817人增长约21.6%，按历史比例估算物理类考生约14.7万 人，较2025年物理类12.1万人增加约20.6%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争，部分抵消扩招效应。；上海交通大学位于上海市，属一线城 市，对甘肃考生具有较强地域吸引力；学校为全国性招生，在甘肃无特。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次 71名、2026年计划大幅扩招600%（从5人增至35人）这一压倒性因素，以及甘肃省物理类考生增加约20.6%带来的竞争加剧、学校声誉偏负面轻微抑制、优势学科持续吸引高分考生 等多重因素，扩招效应远大于考生增加效应，预计2026年最低位次将明显后移。预测最低位次约307名，区间272–342名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年物理类大幅扩招至35人，预测最低位次约307名，区间272–342名。位次在此区间内的考生可以二档专业为主力填报方向，一档王牌专业（人工智能、计算机永强试验班、I EEE试点班）可作为冲刺目标，三档工科试验班类（28人招生名额最多）作为稳妥保底选择。位次明显优于区间上限（<272名）可重点冲刺一档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 494 → 437 → 57 → 63 → 71. In 2021–2022, due to the inclusion of low-score majors such as Natural Science Experimental Class, rankings ranged from 400–500; starting from 2023, the enrollment major structure was adjusted, retaining only high-score major groups, and rankings jumped to the 57–71 range. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 71, with narrow fluctuations between 57 and 71 in the past three years, remaining stable in the top tier. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Gansu Province: 20 in 2021, 4 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 6 in 2024, 5 in 2025; in 2026, the plan significantly expands to 35, an increase of 30 from 2025, a 600% increase. The expansion is extremely significant, which will greatly alleviate admission competition and push the minimum ranking significantly backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 4th consecutively in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top national university camp with an extremely high level of education. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (many retractions, students embezzling bonuses, etc.) and campus safety incidents, with a total of 16 event records. Douyin popularity ranks 42nd, evaluated as relatively hot, with medium-to-high short video exposure. In 2021, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (Henan Science ranked last among Huawu), but no obvious gaps have been seen in recent years. Overall, the slightly negative reputation may mildly suppress application enthusiasm, but SJTU's top-tier status still holds strong appeal. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 28 disciplines were rated A- or above, including A+ disciplines such as Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Biology, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and Foreign Languages and Literature. Among the enrollment majors, Artificial Intelligence and Electronic Information correspond to Computer Science and Technology A+, Mechanical categories correspond to Mechanical Engineering A+, and the Economics and Management Experimental Class corresponds to Business Administration A+ and Management Science and Engineering A+, with extremely strong disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with Artificial Intelligence gaining popularity, highly aligned with SJTU's advantageous disciplines, ensuring sustained application enthusiasm. In Gansu Province, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is approximately 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% from the combined 179,817 Physics and History candidates in 2025. Estimated by historical proportion, Physics candidates are about 147,000, an increase of about 20.6% from 121,000 in 2025. The expansion of the candidate pool intensifies competition, partially offsetting the enrollment expansion effect. Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to Gansu candidates. The university recruits nationwide, with no special policies in Gansu.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 71 in 2025, the overwhelming factor of a 600% enrollment expansion in 2026 (from 5 to 35), along with multiple factors such as a 20.6% increase in Physics candidates in Gansu intensifying competition, a slightly negative reputation mildly suppressing enthusiasm, and advantageous disciplines continuing to attract high-scoring candidates, the expansion effect far outweighs the candidate increase effect. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly shift backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 307, with a range of 272–342.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Artificial Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class)
- Electronic Information (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information Security) (Computer Yongqiang Experimental Class)
- Electronic Information (Computer Science and Technology, Information Engineering, Information Security, Automation) (IEEE Pilot Class, including dual degree programs).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical (Mechanical Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering) (Qian Xuesen Engineering Science Pilot Class, including dual degree programs)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Economics, Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, Human Resource Management, Big Data Management and Application) (including dual degree programs).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Mechanical, Ocean Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Aerospace Engineering, Smart Energy Engineering, Sustainable Energy) (including dual degree programs)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Marine Science (Physical Oceanography and Observation Technology)) (School of Oceanography)
- Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Physics Category significantly expands to 35 students, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 307, range 272–342. Candidates within this ranking range should focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, with Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence, Computer Yongqiang Experimental Class, IEEE Pilot Class) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 Engineering Experimental Class (with the largest enrollment of 28) as a safe backup. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<272) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位 次36名、2026年招生计划持平（2人）、甘肃省历史类考生增加约22.4%加剧竞争、法学专业热度稳定等因素，在考生增加而计划不变的背景下，预计2026年最低位次将小幅前移（ 竞争略加剧）。预测最低位次约31名，区间21–41名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 30th → 38th → 39th → 35th → 36th. Over the past 5 years, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 30–39 range, showing overall stability, with a baseline ranking of about 36th in 2025.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Gansu Province: 1 person each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 2 persons in 2025; the plan for 2026 remains at 2 persons, unchanged from 2025. No change in plan, neutral impact on competition landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 4th consecutively in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, among the top-tier universities nationwide; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents; ranked 42nd in Douyin popularity, evaluated as relatively popular. The overall slightly negative reputation may mildly suppress application enthusiasm, but SJTU's top-tier brand effect remains strong; the Law Experimental Class corresponds to a Law discipline evaluation of A, a dominant discipline at SJTU; the Humanities Experimental Class (Administrative Management) corresponds to the Public Management discipline (not listed in A- and above), but SJTU's overall disciplinary strength is robust. The social popularity of the Law major is recommended (relatively popular), strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Law major's popularity from 2023 to 2024 is recommended/differentiated wait-and-see, with clear advantages for civil service exams, and stable application enthusiasm; the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Gansu Province in 2026 is approximately 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025. Estimated by historical proportion, History Category candidates are about 71,000, an increase of about 22.4% from 58,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Shanghai, located in a first-tier city, has strong regional appeal to high-scoring liberal arts candidates from Gansu; the university enrolls only 2 students in History Category in Gansu, a very small-scale enrollment, making ranking fluctuations highly susceptible to the application intentions of individual high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 36th in 2025, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026 (2 persons), an increase of about 22.4% in History Category candidates in Gansu Province intensifying competition, and stable popularity of the Law major, against the backdrop of increased candidates but unchanged plan, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to move slightly forward (competition slightly intensifies). Predicted minimum ranking approximately 31st, with a range of 21–41.

For candidates within this ranking range, the Law Experimental Class (A-level discipline + dual degree) is a Tier 1 sprint target; the Humanities Experimental Class (including Administrative Management-Law dual degree and PPE direction) is a Tier 3 safety choice. Due to the extremely small enrollment, ranking fluctuations may be significant, so candidates within the range (21–41) are advised to actively apply.
